components.name: Windows Server 2012
components.notes: Windows Server 2012/R2 reached End of Extended Support on October 10, 2023.

components.name: .NET Core
components.notes: '.NET Core' without a specific version is ambiguous. If .NET Core 3.1, EOL Dec 2022. If .NET 6+, current. Classified OUTDATED due to version ambiguity — must clarify and upgrade.

components.name: Microsoft IIS 8.0
components.notes: IIS 8.0 ships with Windows Server 2012 and shares its EOL date of October 10, 2023.

components.name: SQL Server 2019
components.notes: SQL Server 2019 Mainstream Support ended January 7, 2025. Extended Support until January 8, 2030. Functional but not current.

summary: HRApp-004 runs on EOL Windows Server 2012 with EOL IIS 8.0 and an ambiguously versioned .NET Core. SQL Server 2019 is in extended support. High criticality (HR/payroll data) amplifies risk. Hybrid deployment adds complexity.
